target.title: fix(cron): use final-call usage for session token totals
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #91716.

- Use the final API call usage (`lastCallUsage`) for the persisted cron session `totalTokens` context snapshot, falling back to aggregate usage when final-call usage is unavailable.
- Keep aggregate run usage for input/output/cache counters and estimated cost.
- Add focused cron isolated-agent regression coverage for mixed aggregate and final-call usage.

## Root cause

`finalizeCronRun` passed cumulative `agentMeta.usage` into `deriveSessionTotalTokens`, so a cron run with multiple API calls could persist cumulative run tokens as the session context snapshot instead of the final request's context size.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/isolated-agent/run.usage-accounting.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.test-harness.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.usage-accounting.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --codex-bin /private/tmp/codex-autoreview-service-tier-fast` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Cron isolated-agent session accounting now keeps aggregate input/output usage from a real multi-call cron run while deriving the persisted `totalTokens` context snapshot from the final API call only.

Real environment tested: Local macOS OpenClaw PR worktree at `29916a7` with an isolated temporary `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` and `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH`, a real `pnpm openclaw gateway run`, real `pnpm openclaw cron create/run/sessions` CLI calls, and a loopback OpenAI-compatible provider endpoint. No external provider credentials were used.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```console
$ env OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=<proof-state> OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=<proof-config> pnpm openclaw gateway run --port 62560 --bind loopback --auth none --force --ws-log compact
$ env OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=<proof-state> OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=<proof-config> pnpm openclaw cron create '0 0 * * *' 'Read AGENTS.md, then return the final cron proof summary.' --name openclaw-91716-proof --agent main --model proof/fake-cron --session isolated --no-deliver --light-context --tools read --timeout-seconds 60 --json
$ env OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=<proof-state> OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=<proof-config> pnpm openclaw cron run 48e440a9-a786-456a-a7c1-6f93747c7b5c --wait --wait-timeout 2m --poll-interval 1s --expect-final
$ env OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=<proof-state> OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=<proof-config> pnpm openclaw cron runs --id 48e440a9-a786-456a-a7c1-6f93747c7b5c --limit 3
$ env OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=<proof-state> OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=<proof-config> pnpm openclaw sessions --json --all-agents --limit all
```

Evidence after fix:

```json
{
  "cronRun": {
    "status": "ok",
    "summary": "Final cron proof complete after the real read tool call: totalTokens should reflect only this final call.",
    "usage": {
      "input_tokens": 3700,
      "output_tokens": 30,
      "total_tokens": 700
    },
    "deliveryStatus": "not-requested",
    "model": "fake-cron",
    "provider": "proof"
  },
  "sessionStore": {
    "key": "agent:main:cron:48e440a9-a786-456a-a7c1-6f93747c7b5c",
    "inputTokens": 3700,
    "outputTokens": 30,
    "totalTokens": 700,
    "totalTokensFresh": true,
    "contextTokens": 128000,
    "kind": "cron"
  },
  "providerCallLog": [
    {
      "call": 1,
      "stream": true,
      "toolNames": ["read"],
      "usage": {
        "prompt_tokens": 3000,
        "completion_tokens": 10,
        "total_tokens": 3010
      }
    },
    {
      "call": 2,
      "stream": true,
      "lastMessage": "Use concise final answers for proof runs.",
      "usage": {
        "prompt_tokens": 700,
        "completion_tokens": 20,
        "total_tokens": 720
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

Observed result after fix: The real cron run made two streaming provider calls and executed the actual `read` tool between them. The persisted cron session kept aggregate counters (`inputTokens: 3700`, `outputTokens: 30`) while `totalTokens` stayed at the final-call prompt/context snapshot (`700`) instead of the cumulative prompt total (`3700`) or provider call total (`3730`).

What was not tested: Full local suite and broad CI were not run locally; this remains a narrow cron accounting patch and GitHub CI can run on the draft PR. The real behavior proof used a deterministic loopback OpenAI-compatible endpoint rather than a paid external model provider.
target.author: monkeyleet

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
